acceptance_targets: [ch16-f004] PASS if the revised cited block retains no more than two total 'as if' constructions and each replacement still delivers a concrete, scene-specific image; FAIL if four or more 'as if' comparisons remain in chapter_16 or replacements become generic abstractions.

[ch16-f005] PASS if the revised span from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:208 to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:244 includes at least three explicit internal-experience sentences from Marisol and never exceeds five consecutive paragraphs without interiority; FAIL if the block still runs as mostly external crowd coverage.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised cited block retains no more than two total 'as if' constructions and each replacement still delivers a concrete, scene-specific image; FAIL if four or more 'as if' comparisons remain in chapter_16 or replacements become generic abstractions.
findings.problem: The repeated 'as if ...' explanatory comparison appears more than twice and starts to feel like an autopilot sentence shape rather than a deliberate stylistic choice, flattening line-level variety.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:7, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:230, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:306, replace at least three 'as if' constructions with varied devices (direct concrete observation, metaphor without hedge framing, or interior free-indirect inference).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:208 to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:244 includes at least three explicit internal-experience sentences from Marisol and never exceeds five consecutive paragraphs without interiority; FAIL if the block still runs as mostly external crowd coverage.
findings.problem: Interiority drop: after the poem lands, the focalizer runs through a long external-only stretch (10+ consecutive short paragraphs) before re-entering Marisol's internal state, briefly turning the chapter into a transcripted crowd scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: Inject Marisol interior beats into the aftermath block beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:208 and before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:244, using thought/sensation/self-assessment tied to specific external triggers so escalation remains psychologically anchored.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
